# Veranda Restaurant & Bar

> A hillside restaurant, wood-fired banya and family games complex in the mountains of Nha Trang, Vietnam — about 10 minutes from the city centre. Home cooking, live music, open-air cinema and free-entry events.

Veranda is a single venue that combines four "worlds" on one hillside in the Hon Chong / Đường Đệ area of Nha Trang (Khánh Hòa province):

- **Restaurant** — home cooking with a European touch: breakfasts, borscht and solyanka, burgers, salads, cocktails and fresh draught beer.
- **Sila Dukha Banya** — a real Russian wood-fired steam bath with a cold plunge and banya masters.
- **GameZone** — laser tag, Archery Tag (combat archery) and quests; team games for friends and corporate events.
- **Kids' zone (Ananas)** — a children's club with an animator, workshops, discos and turnkey birthday parties.

Evenings feature live music, open-air "cinema under the stars", board-game nights and more — entry to events is free.

- **Address:** Trần Khát Chân, Đường Đệ, Nha Trang, Khánh Hòa, Vietnam (≈12.30° N, 109.21° E)
- **Hours:** Mon–Thu 10:00–22:00 · Fri–Sun 10:00–23:00
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +84 396 314 266
- **Languages:** Russian, English, Vietnamese

## Main pages

- [Home — English](https://veranda.my/home/en/): the complex, weekly event schedule, the four worlds, location and map
- [Home — Русский](https://veranda.my/home/ru/): главная страница комплекса
- [Home — Tiếng Việt](https://veranda.my/home/vi/): trang chủ khu phức hợp
- [Menu](https://veranda.my/links/menu): the food and drink menu
- [Book a table](https://veranda.my/tr3/): table reservation
- [All links](https://veranda.my/links/): link-in-bio page with contacts and socials
